detect-ai-patterns.notes: structure criterion loses 0.25 because devstral-small consistently counts 5 paragraphs instead of 4. Multiple approaches tried (explicit instructions, command execution hint) but model ignores guidance. This is a fundamental limitation of the small model.

rewrite-ai-text.notes: Improved from 95 to 100 after optimizing skill with explicit buzzword replacement list and rewriting guidelines.

changes_made: Removed Python script references (detect.py, transform.py, compare.py) — bare agent uses read/write tools, not CLI scripts
Replaced verbose detection categories tables with concise, actionable lists organized by pattern type
Added structured JSON detection report format example
Added paragraph counting guidance (model ignores it but included for completeness)
Added rewriting guidelines section with step-by-step instructions
Removed scripts/ directory and _meta.json (not referenced by final SKILL.md)
Reduced SKILL.md from 183 lines to ~80 lines for better small model comprehension
